description: Cascade: RP1, RP2, borderline-residual-purity, tail-residual-purity (residual-modal opt-in).

stages.name: residual-modal
stages.source: FP1->FP2 residual query buckets over test-data.json (no request ids)

stages.name: borderline-residual-purity
stages.source: FP1->FP2 residual queries from test-data.json, bucket purity over decision (approve/decline)

stages.name: tail-residual-purity
stages.source: FP1->FP2 residual queries from test-data.json, bucket purity over decision (approve/decline)
